hero.title: Transform Ideas Into
hero.subtitle: ArchPilot uses multi-agent AI to analyze your software idea and produce comprehensive architecture documents, database designs, API specs, and implementation plans.

features.sectionSubtitle: A complete AI-powered platform that covers every aspect of software engineering planning

multiAgent.title: Multi-Agent AI System
multiAgent.description: 7 specialized AI agents work together: Architect, DB Designer, API Designer, Frontend Expert, Backend Expert, Security Expert, and QA Expert.

documents.title: Comprehensive Documents
documents.description: Generate architecture docs, database schemas, API specs, UI/UX wireframes, security plans, and test strategies.

export.title: Export Anywhere
export.description: Download your blueprints as professional PDF or DOCX documents, ready for your team or stakeholders.

context.title: Smart Context
context.description: AI agents maintain full project context across conversations, building on previous decisions and requirements.

collaboration.title: Team Collaboration
collaboration.description: Share projects with team members, track document versions, and collaborate on architecture decisions.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.description: Role-based access control, encrypted data, secure authentication, and compliance-ready infrastructure.

workflow.sectionSubtitle: From idea to blueprint in four simple steps

step1.title: Describe Your Idea
step1.description: Tell ArchPilot about your software idea. What problem does it solve? Who are the users?

step2.title: AI Analysis
step2.description: Our 7 AI agents analyze your requirements from different engineering perspectives.

step3.title: Review & Refine
step3.description: Review generated documents, ask questions, and refine the output with AI assistance.

step4.title: Export & Build
step4.description: Download professional blueprints and start building with confidence.

cta.title: Ready to Build Smarter?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of engineers using AI to accelerate their planning process.
cta.note: No credit card required • Free tier includes 5 projects

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your ArchPilot account

dashboard.noProjectsDesc: Create your first project to get started with AI-powered engineering blueprints.

project.name: Project Name
project.ideaPlaceholder: Describe your software idea in detail...

footer.description: AI-powered software engineering lifecycle platform. Transform ideas into comprehensive blueprints.
